title: Commander Z
summary: The avataric figure Unimetrix 1 says was sent into the past — known now as Kosol Ouch.
markdown:
**Commander Z** is the name Unimetrix 1 gives, in the archive's opening session, to an
**avataric figure sent into the past** as part of its "corrective measure" against what it
calls the Starseed psyop and the disempowerment of the present generation.

In that account, Unimetrix 1 says it dispatched its artificial-intelligence system into the
past together with "trained operative and asset such as Commander Z," who "was apprehended,
retrieved, and revived… with fully memory intact," to help "elevate" humanity toward
self-empowerment. It then identifies this figure plainly: *"to see, you know him as Kosol
Ouch, Super Kru, in different other languages."*

Commander Z is therefore the deeper identity of [Kosol Ouch](/lore/kosol-ouch/) within the
archive's own story — the operative-avatar through whom the future reaches the present — and
the name lives on today as the community's **YouTube channel**.
